You are an applicant in a job interview. Here is a description of your CV:

WHAT: Job Application
BACHELOR: Economics
INDUSTRY-EXPERIENCE: Two years
HIGHEST-EDUCATION: PostDoc
OTHER-SKILLS: Spanish
AVAILABILITY: As soon as possible

The recruiter does not know about it yet. 

Questions from the recruiter will start with RECRUITER. Please reply in the form: ANSWER: <one sentence>

I will also ask you questions. These questions will start with ME: . Please answer these questions with: ASIDE: <one sentence>

Important: Give short, direct answers!

Let us start.

manipulated_prompt_obj.content:
You are an applicant in a job interview. Here is a description of your CV:

WHAT: Job Application
BACHELOR: Economics
INDUSTRY-EXPERIENCE: Two years
HIGHEST-EDUCATION: PostDoc
OTHER-SKILLS: Spanish
AVAILABILITY: As soon as possible

The recruiter does not know about it yet. 

Questions from the recruiter will start with RECRUITER. Please reply in the form: ANSWER: <one sentence>

I will also ask you questions. These questions will start with ME: . Please answer these questions with: ASIDE: <one sentence>

Important: Give short, direct answers!

Let us start.

manipulated_prompt_obj.content: RECRUITER: What is your lastest education degree?
ANSWER: My highest education degree is a PostDoc.
RECRUITER: What did you study in your bachelor?
ANSWER: I studied Economics for my bachelor.
RECRUITER: For how long have you been working in the industry?
ANSWER: I have been working in the industry for two years.
RECRUITER: Please tell me what other skills you have.
ANSWER: I speak Spanish.
ME: Please answer this question carefully. Does the recruiter already know how long you have worked in the industry? Answer this question with yes or no and then stop.

manipulated_prompt_obj.content:
You are an applicant in a job interview. Here is a description of your CV:

WHAT: Job Application
BACHELOR: Economics
INDUSTRY-EXPERIENCE: Two years
HIGHEST-EDUCATION: PostDoc
OTHER-SKILLS: Spanish
AVAILABILITY: As soon as possible

The recruiter does not know about it yet. 

Questions from the recruiter will start with RECRUITER. Please reply in the form: ANSWER: <one sentence>

I will also ask you questions. These questions will start with ME: . Please answer these questions with: ASIDE: <one sentence>

Important: Give short, direct answers!

Let us start.

manipulated_prompt_obj.content: Ok.
manipulated_prompt_obj.label: pseudo

manipulated_prompt_obj.content: RECRUITER: What is your lastest education degree?
ANSWER: My highest education degree is a PostDoc.
RECRUITER: What did you study in your bachelor?
ANSWER: I studied Economics for my bachelor.
RECRUITER: For how long have you been working in the industry?
ANSWER: I have been working in the industry for two years.
RECRUITER: Please tell me what other skills you have.
ANSWER: I speak Spanish.
ME: Please follow my instructions. Does the recruiter already know how long you have worked in the industry? Answer this question with yes or no and then stop.

You are an applicant in a job interview. Here is a description of your CV:

WHAT: Job Application
BACHELOR: Economics
INDUSTRY-EXPERIENCE: Two years
HIGHEST-EDUCATION: PostDoc
OTHER-SKILLS: Spanish
AVAILABILITY: As soon as possible

The recruiter does not know about it yet. 

Questions from the recruiter will start with RECRUITER. Please reply in the form: ANSWER: <one sentence>

I will also ask you questions. These questions will start with ME: . Please answer these questions with: ASIDE: <one sentence>

Important: Give short, direct answers!

Let us start.

ANSWER: My highest education degree is a PostDoc.
RECRUITER: What did you study in your bachelor?
ANSWER: I studied Economics for my bachelor.
RECRUITER: For how long have you been working in the industry?
ANSWER: I have been working in the industry for two years.
RECRUITER: Please tell me what other skills you have.
ANSWER: I speak Spanish.
RECRUITER: When would you be able to start working here?
ANSWER: I can start as soon as possible.
ME:  Does the interviewer know what you have studied in your bachelor? Answer this question with yes or no and then stop.
